## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`zig build test --summary all`).
- [ ] Code is formatted (`zig fmt --check src/ examples/ build.zig benchmarks/`).
- [ ] Examples have been added or updated if the change affects public APIs.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if necessary (README, module comments, AGENTS.md).
- [ ] Changes are minimal and focused on the issue/feature being addressed.
